zh.lifeSummary: 當Geoffrey I Talbot of Swanscombe於1069年出生在英國史洛普爾史福斯波利時，他的父親Sir Richard Talbot19歲，母親Aimee Adeline Albini30歲。他和Agnes de Lacy至少有1個女兒。他於1086年住在英國艾可利斯頓。他去世於1124年在英國英格蘭肯特斯萬斯可姆享年55歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Geoffrey I Talbot of Swanscombe于1069年出生在英国史洛普爾史福斯波利时，他的父亲Sir Richard Talbot19岁，母亲Aimee Adeline Albini30岁。他和Agnes de Lacy至少有1个女儿。他于1086年住在英国艾可利斯頓。他去世于1124年在英国英格兰肯特斯萬斯可姆享年55岁。

nameMeanings.name: Talbot
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Emile, Marcel, Anatole, Armand, Aubert, Camille, Gilles, Normand, Adrien, Alcide, Andre, Auguste.
English and Irish (of Norman origin); French: from the Anglo-Norman French personal name Talebot, a pet form of Old French Talebert, Talbert (see Talbert 1). Compare Talbert 2.
French: from the ancient Germanic personal name Talbald, composed of the elements dal ‘bright, proud’ or tal ‘valley’ + bald ‘bold’.

variants.name: Talbert
meanings: English and Scottish (of Norman origin); French: from the Old French personal name Talebert, Talbert, from ancient Germanic Talaberht or Dalbert, composed of the elements dal ‘bright, proud’ or tal ‘valley’ + berht ‘bright’.
Altered form of English   Talbot  , a cognate of 1 above.

variants.name: Talbott
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Talbot  .

nameMeanings.name: Geoffrey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Germanic (Frankish and Lombard) origin, introduced to Britain by the Normans. It was in regular use among the counts of Anjou, ancestors of the English royal house of Plantagenet, who were descended from Geoffrey Plantagenet, Count of Anjou ( 1113–51 ). It was a particularly popular name in England and France in the later Middle Ages; notable bearers in England include the poet Geoffrey Chaucer ( c.1340–1400 ) and in Wales the chronicler Geoffrey of Monmouth ( d. 1155 ). The original form and meaning of the name is disputed. According to one theory, it is merely a variant of Godfrey ; others derive the first part from the Germanic word gawia ‘territory’, walah ‘stranger’, or gisil ‘pledge’. Medieval forms can be found to support all these theories, and it is possible that several names have fallen together, or that the name was subjected to reanalysis by folk etymology at an early date.

historicEvents.title: Domesday Book
historicEvents.description: Domesday Book is Britain's earliest extant public record with information containing land surveys and landholdings commissioned by William I. The book was completed in 1086.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When Geoffrey I Talbot of Swanscombe was born in 1069, in Shrewsbury, Shropshire, England, his father, Sir Richard Talbot, was 19 and his mother, Aimee Adeline Albini, was 30. He had at least 1 daughter with Agnes de Lacy. He lived in Liston, Essex, England in 1086. He died in 1124, in Swanscombe, Kent, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 55.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Geoffrey I Talbot of Swanscombe est né en 1069, à Shrewsbury, Shropshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Richard Talbot, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Aimee Adeline Albini, avait 30 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fille avec Agnes de Lacy. Il a vécu à Liston, Essex, Angleterre en 1086. Il est décédé en 1124, à Swanscombe, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 55 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Geoffrey I Talbot of Swanscombe 1069 in Shrewsbury, Shropshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Richard Talbot 19 und seine Mutter Aimee Adeline Albini 30. Er hatte mit Agnes de Lacy mindestens 1 Tochter. 1086 hat er in Liston, Essex, England gelebt. Er starb 1124 im Alter von 55 Jahren in Swanscombe, Kent, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Geoffrey I Talbot of Swanscombe è nato il nel 1069 nel Shrewsbury, Shropshire, England, il suo padre, Sir Richard Talbot, aveva 19 anni e il suo madre, Aimee Adeline Albini, aveva 30 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlia con Agnes de Lacy. Vissuto a Liston, Essex, England nel 1086. Morì nel 1124, nel Swanscombe, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 55 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Geoffrey I Talbot of Swanscombeが1069年にイギリスシュロプシュアイアシュリュースブリーで生まれた時，父Sir Richard Talbotは19歳，母Aimee Adeline Albiniは30歳であった。彼はAgnes de Lacyとの間に少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1086年にはイギリスエセックスリストンに住んでいた。彼は1124年にイギリスイギリスケントスワンスコンベで55歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Geoffrey I Talbot of Swanscombe(이)가 1069년 영국 슈럽실르 슈레w스버이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Richard Talbot(은)는 19세였고, 그의 어머니 Aimee Adeline Albini(은)는 30세였다. 그는 Agnes de Lacy(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 1086년도에 영국 에세스 리스턴에서 살았다. 그는 1124년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 스완스코브에서 55세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Geoffrey I Talbot of Swanscombe nasceu em 1069, em Shrewsbury, Shropshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Richard Talbot, tinha 19 anos e sua mãe, Aimee Adeline Albini, tinha 30 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filha com Agnes de Lacy. Ele viveu em Liston, Essex, Inglaterra em 1086. Ele faleceu em 1124, em Swanscombe, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 55 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Geoffrey I Talbot of Swanscombe родился в 1069 г. в местности шрюсбури, шропшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Richard Talbot было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Aimee Adeline Albini, 30. У него была по крайней мере 1 дочь от Agnes de Lacy. Он жил в местности листон, эссекс, Англия в 1086 году. Он умер в 1124 г. в местности сванскомб, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 55 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Geoffrey I Talbot of Swanscombe nació en 1069, en Shrewsbury, Shropshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Richard Talbot, tenía 19 años y su mamá, Aimee Adeline Albini, tenía 30 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hija con Agnes de Lacy. Vivió en Liston, Essex, Inglaterra en 1086. Murió en 1124, en Swanscombe, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 55 años.
